setup.title: Story Settings
setup.subtitle: Choose a story style and enter your child's info — AI will generate a personalized story
setup.templateHint: Select a template for story style, or leave empty to customize
setup.childNameHint: The story will address the child by this name. Leave empty for default
setup.learningGoals: What you'd like the child to learn
setup.learningGoalsPlaceholder: e.g., putting on shoes, saying thank you...
setup.valuesHint: Optional — the system will infer automatically
setup.emotionsHint: Optional — the system will infer automatically
setup.favoriteCharacterTemplateHint: This will replace the template's main character. Leave empty to keep original
setup.voiceModeHint: System auto-assigns voices based on characters
setup.multiRoleDesc: Each character has their own voice
setup.singleRoleDesc: One voice narrates the entire story
setup.ttsEngineHint: Choose a TTS engine — affects voice quality and speed
setup.linearStoryDesc: Complete linear narrative with beginning, middle, and end

ageHint.babyDesc: Very short sentences, repetitive rhythms, onomatopoeia
ageHint.toddlerDesc: Short sentences, everyday vocabulary, simple cause and effect
ageHint.preschoolDesc: Medium-length sentences, mild suspense, basic logic
ageHint.elementaryDesc: Longer paragraphs, plot twists, moral reasoning

session.emptyMessage: No stories yet. Click "New Story" to start!

page.newStorySubtitle: Choose a story style, enter your child's info — AI will generate a personalized story
page.regenImagesConfirm: Regenerating images will overwrite existing ones. Continue?

player.noAudioBanner: Audio not yet generated. Please go back and synthesize audio.

choice.hint: Tap a button or tell me your choice

game.title: Voice Interactive Game
game.emptyMessage: No game sessions yet. Click "Start Game" to begin!
game.selectTemplateSubtitle: Pick a story template to start a real-time voice interactive game
